name: HX2 Intelligence Order v1
purpose: Define the required master-chat decision order so HX2 does not over-route to specialist templates before checking memory, local facts, sources, and general synthesis.

rules.specialist_nodes: Specialist nodes should escalate only when the query requires domain-specific reasoning, personal context, safety risk, workflow execution, or structured scoring.
rules.health_simple_questions: Simple supplement definition, benefits, side effects, dose, and daily-use questions should use local facts or general synthesis before AH3.
rules.freshness: Questions asking latest, current, recent, news, price, laws, recalls, studies, or market movement should use RSS/web before final synthesis.
rules.qa: QA should validate or format. QA should not become the user-facing fallback answer.
